## CheatReader v0.1.15

### Highlights
- Added customizable reader text colors with an automatic mode that still adapts to background opacity.
- Improved transparent mode readability with contrast-aware text shadows, so light desktop backgrounds remain usable.
- Replaced the About-panel version copy action with an in-app latest-version checker that can open GitHub Releases directly.

### Notes
- If automatic update checking is temporarily unavailable, CheatReader now falls back to opening the Releases page instead of stopping at a generic failure message.
- Existing reader settings and bookshelf data continue to work as before.
